title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 511.300 - Effect of judgment for conveyance
text:
511.300.  Effect of judgment for conveyance. — When an unconditional judgment shall be made for a conveyance, release or acquittance, and the party required to execute the same shall not comply therewith, such judgment shall be considered and taken to have the same operation and effect and be as available as if the conveyance, release or acquittance had been executed conformably to the judgment.
(RSMo 1939 § 1257) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1091; 1919 § 1542; 1909 § 2111
